title: Performance Report

property_overview.title: Property Overview
property_overview.description: A summary of key performance indicators for the selected period.

financial_summary.title: Financial Summary
financial_summary.description: A detailed breakdown of revenue, expenses, and net profit for the period.
financial_summary.rooms_revenue_desc: Total revenue generated from room bookings.
financial_summary.extras_revenue_desc: Total revenue from add-on services and meal plans.
financial_summary.total_revenue_gross_desc: Sum of rooms and extras revenue before deductions.
financial_summary.discounts_applied_desc: Total value of all promotions and discounts.
financial_summary.paid_with_loyalty_desc: Value of bookings paid for using guest loyalty points.
financial_summary.net_revenue_desc: Gross revenue minus discounts and loyalty payments.
financial_summary.total_expenses_desc: Sum of all recorded fixed and variable expenses.
financial_summary.taxes_and_fees_desc: Total taxes collected, not included in profit calculation.

no_room_data: No room revenue data available for the selected period.
no_extras_data: No extras revenue data available for the selected period.
no_expenses_data: No expenses were recorded for this period.
